watches.name: Royal Perpetual Tourbillon
watches.description: A masterpiece of haute horlogerie, the Royal Perpetual Tourbillon features a flying tourbillon escapement with perpetual calendar and moon phase complication. The 42mm rose gold case houses an in-house caliber with 72-hour power reserve. Sapphire crystal front and back with anti-reflective coating.

watches.name: Submariner Deep Blue
watches.description: Built for the depths, the Submariner Deep Blue features 1000m water resistance with a unidirectional rotating bezel in ceramic. The luminous dial ensures visibility in complete darkness. Powered by an automatic movement with helium escape valve and COSC chronometer certification.

watches.name: Aviator Chronograph Pro
watches.description: Inspired by vintage pilot watches, the Aviator Chronograph Pro combines classic aviation aesthetics with modern precision. Features a flyback chronograph, GMT function, and slide rule bezel. The anti-magnetic case is certified for extreme conditions from -20°C to +60°C.

watches.name: Dress Watch Ultra Slim
watches.description: The epitome of refined elegance, this ultra-slim dress watch measures just 6.5mm in height. The white lacquered dial with Roman numerals and blued steel hands presents a timeless aesthetic. Paired with a hand-stitched alligator strap in midnight navy.

watches.name: Skeleton Automatic
watches.description: The Skeleton Automatic is a window into the art of watchmaking. Every bridge and plate has been hand-chamfered and polished to reveal the intricate mechanics within. The 45mm titanium case with sapphire dial front and back showcases the manually-wound movement in its full glory.

watches.name: Heritage GMT Traveler
watches.description: Track two time zones simultaneously with the Heritage GMT Traveler. The distinctive two-tone bezel in red and blue ceramic has become an icon among frequent travelers. Automatic movement with quick-set GMT hand and date display. 100m water resistance with screw-down crown.

watches.name: Chronograph Steel
watches.description: A versatile sports chronograph with tachymeter scale for measuring speed over distance. The integrated steel bracelet with push-button clasp ensures a secure fit during any activity. Water resistant to 100m with luminous hands and hour markers for low-light visibility.

watches.name: Pearl Moonphase
watches.description: Celebrating the poetry of the moon, the Pearl Moonphase features a mother-of-pearl dial with a hand-painted moonphase disc accurate to one day in 135 years. Set with 68 brilliant-cut diamonds on the bezel. Available on a satin-finished bracelet or leather strap.

watches.name: Tactical Field Watch
watches.description: Engineered for the field, the Tactical Field Watch is built to withstand the harshest environments. Shock-resistant, anti-magnetic, and water resistant to 200m. The matte black PVD case with scratch-resistant mineral crystal is complemented by a reinforced rubber strap with quick-release system.

watches.name: Rose Gold Eternal
watches.description: The Rose Gold Eternal is a declaration of timeless beauty. The 39mm case in 18k rose gold houses a hand-wound movement with a power reserve indicator. The salmon-toned sunburst dial with applied gold indices catches the light with every movement of the wrist.

watches.name: Smart Connect Pro
watches.description: Bridging the gap between traditional elegance and modern technology, the Smart Connect Pro features health monitoring, GPS tracking, and 7-day battery life in a premium stainless steel body. Compatible with iOS and Android with customizable watch faces and interchangeable straps.

watches.name: Vintage Automatic 1960
watches.description: A faithful recreation of a 1960 design, this vintage-inspired automatic watch features a domed crystal, textured dial, and period-correct lug shape. The self-winding movement has been modernized with improved accuracy and water resistance while preserving the soul of the original.

watches.name: Oceanic Diver Elite
watches.description: Designed for professional divers, the Oceanic Elite meets ISO 6425 diver's watch standards. Features a 600m water resistance rating, luminous bezel, and super-LumiNova coating on all indicators. The titanium case reduces weight without sacrificing durability.

watches.name: Minimalist White
watches.description: Less is more with the Minimalist White. A clean white dial with only hour and minute hands and a discreet date window at 3 o'clock. The 38mm stainless steel case on a genuine leather strap makes this the perfect everyday dress watch for any occasion.

watches.name: Carbon Fiber Racer
watches.description: Born from motorsport, the Carbon Fiber Racer features a forged carbon fiber case that is stronger than steel yet lighter than aluminum. The tachymeter bezel and racing stripe dial pay homage to track culture. Automatic movement with 48-hour power reserve.

watches.name: Grand Complication Master
watches.description: The pinnacle of watchmaking art, the Grand Complication Master features a minute repeater, perpetual calendar, rattrapante chronograph, and celestial chart in a 46mm platinum case. Each watch requires 18 months of assembly by a single master watchmaker and is individually numbered.
